drivers.name: Lando Norris
drivers.quote: I'M READY TO BRING THE FIGHT TO EVERYONE.

drivers.name: Oscar Piastri
drivers.quote: I LIKE CARS, I LIKE RACING, BUT I THINK THE COMPETITION SIDE OF THINGS IS PROBABLY THE NUMBER ONE THING.

drivers.name: Charles Leclerc
drivers.quote: WHATEVER THE POSITION IS AT STAKE, YOU'VE GOT TO DO YOUR ABSOLUTE BEST AS A DRIVER WHETHER YOU'RE FIGHTING FOR THE FIFTH, FOURTH OR FIRST POSITION.

drivers.name: Lewis Hamilton
drivers.quote: DRIVING A SCUDERIA FERRARI HP CAR FOR THE FIRST TIME WAS ONE OF THE BEST FEELINGS OF MY LIFE.

drivers.name: Max Verstappen
drivers.quote: I HATE LOSING!

drivers.name: Isack Hadjar
drivers.quote: I’M SOMEONE WHO FOUGHT HIS WAY TO F1 THE HARD WAY.

drivers.name: George Russell
drivers.quote: ON GEORGE, YOU CAN RELY ON HIM WHEN IT COMES TO LAP TIMES AND RACING, SO SPIRITS ARE HIGH.

drivers.name: Kimi Antonelli
drivers.quote: RACING FOR MERCEDES IS A BIG RESPONSIBILITY, BUT AT THE SAME TIME IT’S A GREAT OPPORTUNITY AND A PRIVILEGE.

drivers.name: Fernando Alonso
drivers.quote: I NEVER REGRET ANYTHING.

drivers.name: Lance Stroll
drivers.quote: WE’VE GROWN SO MUCH AS A TEAM AND THERE’S STILL SO MUCH MORE TO LOOK FORWARD TO.

drivers.name: Pierre Gasly
drivers.quote: THE MOMENT I LOVE THE MOST IS WHENEVER I GET IN THAT CAR, FIGHTING THE BEST 19 DRIVERS IN THE WORLD, AND THIS EXERCISE OF BEATING THEM.

drivers.name: Franco Colapinto
drivers.quote: I WILL GIVE IT MY ALL TO DELIVER THE BEST POSSIBLE RESULTS.

drivers.name: Esteban Ocon
drivers.quote: TOUGH RACING IS ALWAYS COOL TO ME. RACING SIDE-BY-SIDE, BEING VERY CLOSE, THAT’S WHAT RACING IS ALL ABOUT.

drivers.name: Oliver Bearman
drivers.quote: I’M A COMPETITIVE GUY, I LIKE TO BE GOOD AT EVERYTHING I DO.

drivers.name: Liam Lawson
drivers.quote: I'M NOT HERE TO MAKE FRIENDS. I'M HERE TO WIN - THAT'S WHAT I'M FOCUSED ON DOING.

drivers.name: Arvid Lindblad
drivers.quote: SINCE I STARTED THIS JOURNEY AT FIVE YEARS OLD, IT WAS ALWAYS MY GOAL TO BE IN FORMULA 1 SO IT’S A PROUD MOMENT TO TAKE THIS STEP.

drivers.name: Alex Albon
drivers.quote: I’M READY TO WIN RACES, TO FIGHT FOR A CHAMPIONSHIP.

drivers.name: Carlos Sainz
drivers.quote: I ALWAYS PERFORM AT MY BEST WHEN I JUST DON’T CARE ABOUT THE SITUATION AND HAVE A SINGLE MENTALITY THAT IT’S JUST GO FOR IT.

drivers.name: Gabriel Bortoleto
drivers.quote: I WANT TO BE ABLE TO FIGHT FOR THINGS AND TO MAKE MY COUNTRY PROUD OF EVERYTHING I CAN ACHIEVE.

drivers.name: Nico Hulkenberg
drivers.quote: I’M READY TO WIN RACES, TO FIGHT FOR A CHAMPIONSHIP.

drivers.name: Sergio Perez
drivers.quote: I WANT TO BELIEVE IN HARD WORK, DETERMINATION, AND NEVER GIVING UP.

drivers.name: Valtteri Bottas
drivers.quote: SOMETIMES YOU HAVE TO ACCEPT THAT THINGS DON’T ALWAYS GO YOUR WAY, BUT YOU CAN LEARN FROM EVERY EXPERIENCE.
